title: 1.1: Tests that REP control sequence repeats the last drawn character once when invoked without an explicit count parameter
1.2: Tests that REP control sequence repeats the last drawn character N times when given an explicit count parameter
1.3: Tests that REP control sequence works with non-alphabetic characters such as space
1.4: Tests that emoji with skin tone modifier is stored correctly in the screen buffer as a combined sequence.
1.5: Tests that cursor position advances by 2 cells after drawing an emoji with skin tone modifier
1.6: Tests that regional indicator pair renders correctly as a flag emoji in the screen buffer
1.7: Tests that cursor position advances by 2 cells after drawing a regional indicator pair
1.8: Tests that unpaired regional indicator is handled by drawing individual characters separately and verifying they do not combine
1.10: Tests that ZWJ emoji sequence with 4 family members is stored correctly in the screen buffer.
2.1: Places the test for REP control sequence character repetition in kitty_tests/screen.py
2.2: Places the test for emoji skin tone modifier rendering in kitty_tests/screen.py
2.3: Places the test for regional indicator flag emoji rendering in kitty_tests/screen.py
2.4: Places the test for zero-width joiner sequence rendering in kitty_tests/screen.py
3.1: All tests use Python unittest framework
3.2: All tests are defined as methods within a class that inherits from BaseTest
3.3: All tests follow the naming pattern test_<descriptive_name>
3.4: All tests use self.create_screen() method to instantiate screen objects
4.1: Uses parse_bytes() function to send raw escape sequences for REP control sequence
